description_long: This is a large, classic-style sofa with a deep seat and rolled armrests, upholstered in a solid, dark gray fabric. The backrest and armrests feature a tufted pattern, adding a touch of elegance and traditional charm. The sofa has two wide, plush seat cushions that appear to be attached and provide ample seating space. The armrests are high and rounded, matching the height of the backrest and giving the sofa a cohesive, enveloping silhouette. The legs are short, dark, and slightly rounded, positioned at the corners and providing stable support. Overall, the sofa exudes a sense of comfort and sophistication, suitable for both indoor and sheltered outdoor urban environments.
description: A large, tufted dark gray sofa with rolled armrests, two wide seat cushions, and short rounded legs, exuding classic elegance and comfort.
description_view_0: Side view showing the rolled armrest and the depth of the seat, with tufted detailing visible on the arm and backrest.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the two wide seat cushions, tufted backrest, and symmetrical rolled armrests.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, showing the other rolled armrest and the sofa's depth.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the smooth, continuous back panel and the rounded tops of the armrests.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Two wide, attached seat cushions and a continuous, tufted back cushion; all cushions are uniform in size and fixed in place.
attribute_armrest_style: High, rolled armrests matching the backrest height, fully upholstered with tufted detailing and a rounded profile.
attribute_leg_design: Four short, rounded legs positioned at the corners, likely made of dark wood or metal, slightly recessed for stability.
attribute_backrest_type: High, continuous backrest with a straight top edge and deep tufting, providing full back support.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid dark gray fabric with a tufted pattern on the backrest and armrests, creating a textured, classic look.
